violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (measuring cup) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed/sanitized item. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026

Hashbrowns were observed held between 110-122 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026

Cheese, sausage, ham, and corned beef were observed held at 45-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed in cooler for active cooling and discarded ham, corned beef, and sausage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. PIC labeled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings throughout the basement areas. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the chlorine spray bottle was greater than 200 parts per million (ppm).The required concentration for chlorine sanitizer is between 50-100 ppm. PIC refilled and tested. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026
The two door refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves in the basement have an accumulation of droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026
The floors in the basement area has an accumulation of droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026
The two door refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
The floors in the dishwashing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose all foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. PIC updated menu electronically during inspection and will reprint menu. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026
Inspector observed a dead mouse in a glue trap. PIC discarded mouse. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026

The door to the outside, located in the back hallway, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by small droppings throughout basement area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026
The two door refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - table under flattop grill, - shelves near cashier area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026

The floors throughout the basement area have an accumulation of soil residue, small droppings, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
The floors in the dishwashing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026
